tickets.subject: How to connect Gmail integration?
tickets.message: Hi team, I just signed up for TechFlow and want to connect my Gmail account. I went to Settings but can't find the integration option. Can you help?

tickets.subject: Workflow not triggering
tickets.message: I created a workflow that should send a Slack message when I receive a new email. It's not working. I've double-checked everything. Please help urgently - this is blocking my team.

tickets.subject: Pricing inquiry - need custom pricing
tickets.message: Hi, we're a growing company with 50 employees and we're interested in TechFlow. The Enterprise plan looks good but we have some custom requirements. Can we discuss pricing?

tickets.subject: Refund request
tickets.message: I subscribed to the Professional plan last week but realized we don't need all the features. I'd like to request a refund and downgrade to Starter.

tickets.subject: Data security questions
tickets.message: Before we deploy TechFlow company-wide, I need to understand your data security practices. Where is our data stored? Is it encrypted? Do you have SOC 2 certification?

tickets.subject: Feature request: batch processing
tickets.message: Love the product! One thing that would help us a lot is the ability to process multiple records at once in a workflow. We have to handle hundreds of leads daily.

tickets.subject: API documentation?
tickets.message: Do you have a REST API available? We want to integrate TechFlow into our internal systems programmatically.

tickets.subject: Workflow execution limits
tickets.message: I'm on the Professional plan but getting 'execution limit reached' errors. How many concurrent executions do I get? This is impacting our operations.

tickets.subject: Thanks for the help!
tickets.message: Just wanted to say thanks for helping me set up my Slack integration yesterday. It's working perfectly now. Your team is great!

tickets.subject: Webhook setup confusion
tickets.message: I'm trying to set up a webhook from another system to trigger a TechFlow workflow. The documentation isn't clear about authentication. Do I need to include an API key?

tickets.subject: Terms of service question
tickets.message: We need to clarify a point in your terms of service regarding data ownership. Can we schedule a call with your legal team?

tickets.subject: Custom branding for Enterprise?
tickets.message: For Enterprise plan, can we customize the branding? We want to white-label the solution for our clients.
Hey, my workflow stopped working. Any idea why?
Can I upgrade my plan via WhatsApp?
This platform is awesome! Saved me hours today! 🎉
How do I add conditional logic to my workflow?
Why is my workflow so slow? Taking forever to execute!
I want to request a refund pls
Can I use TechFlow with Microsoft Teams?
What's the difference between Starter and Professional?
My workflow keeps failing! This is ridiculous!
Thanks! Your support is great! 👍
Can I schedule workflows to run at specific times?
How many integrations are available?
My trial expired. How do I pay?
F*** this! Nothing works! Fix your damn system!
Is there a mobile app?

tickets.subject: Integration help needed
tickets.message: I'm trying to connect Salesforce but I'm getting an OAuth error. It says 'Insufficient permissions'. What should I do?

tickets.subject: Getting started guide
tickets.message: I'm new here. Can you point me to a getting started guide? I want to create my first workflow but don't know where to begin.

tickets.subject: Data transformation question
tickets.message: How can I transform a date format from MM/DD/YYYY to YYYY-MM-DD in my workflow? I need to send this to an API that requires ISO format.

tickets.subject: Workflow performance issues
tickets.message: My workflow takes 15 minutes to complete but it only processes 50 records. Is this normal? How can I speed it up?

tickets.subject: Enterprise pricing inquiry
tickets.message: We're a 100-person company interested in the Enterprise plan. What kind of support response time can we expect?

tickets.subject: Error handling best practices
tickets.message: What's the best way to handle errors in workflows? I want to make sure my workflows are robust.

tickets.subject: Can't find feature
tickets.message: I heard TechFlow can process arrays but I can't find that feature. Is it available? How do I use it?

tickets.subject: Billing cycle question
tickets.message: When am I billed? Is it monthly or annually? Can I change my billing cycle?

tickets.subject: Custom API integration
tickets.message: I need to integrate with a custom REST API that uses OAuth 2.0. Can TechFlow handle custom authentication?

tickets.subject: Workflow not saving
tickets.message: I've been trying to save my workflow for the last 10 minutes but it keeps spinning. This is critical for our deadline today!

tickets.subject: Great product!
tickets.message: Just wanted to say TechFlow has transformed how we work. Our productivity has doubled since we started using it. Keep up the great work!

tickets.subject: Cancel subscription
tickets.message: I need to cancel my subscription. Please process this immediately.

tickets.subject: Security compliance
tickets.message: We're in healthcare and need HIPAA compliance. Is TechFlow HIPAA compliant? Can you provide a BAA?

tickets.subject: SSO integration
tickets.message: For Enterprise plan, do you support SAML 2.0 single sign-on? We use Okta and need SSO for all our tools.

tickets.subject: Webhook signature verification
tickets.message: I'm receiving webhooks from an external service. How do I verify the signature to ensure the webhook is authentic?

tickets.subject: Third escalation for same issue!
tickets.message: This is the THIRD time I'm contacting you about the same issue! It's still not fixed. I'm seriously considering cancelling my subscription if this doesn't get resolved.
Can I export my workflow data?

tickets.subject: Trial extension request
tickets.message: I'm on the 14-day trial but need more time to evaluate. Can you extend my trial by another week?

tickets.subject: Thank you for the quick response!
tickets.message: Wow, I didn't expect such a fast response. My issue is resolved now. Your team is amazing!
How do I contact human support?
